title: Airframe Architecture Document
description: Architecture document defining twin-boom composite airframe configuration material selection and primary load paths

title: Wing and Solar Array Architecture Document
description: Architecture document for solar wing including flex spar configuration AR definition and solar cell substrate integration

title: Energy System Architecture Document
description: Architecture document defining solar generation battery buffer MPPT electronics and day/night energy management logic

title: Propulsion System Architecture Document
description: Architecture document for 4x electric propulsion units including motor controller bus architecture and propeller sizing

title: Payload System Architecture Document
description: Payload bay architecture document covering mechanical interface power allocation and thermal management for comms EO and ISR

title: Tail Assembly Architecture Document
description: Architecture document for twin-boom H-tail including boom dimensions attachment fittings and control surface layout

title: System Interface Control Document (ICD)
description: ICD defining all inter-subsystem interfaces: power bus data links mechanical fittings and thermal paths
